seed.dev/review-findings.md:
# Review findings

One `##` section per file; one `- [ ] [P0|P1|P2]` line per finding.
Install the code-review plugin and pick "Review findings" as the renderer to get badges and a progress bar.

## src/api/auth.rs

- [ ] [P0] Token expiry is never checked on the refresh path
- [ ] [P2] `validate_scope` duplicates the check in middleware

## src/db/pool.rs

- [x] [P1] Pool size is hard-coded; read it from config
seed.dev/tasks.md:
# Tasks

- [ ] Reproduce the bug locally
- [ ] Add a failing test
- [x] File the issue

> Works with the md-checklist renderer: check an item and it writes back to this file.
seed.prompts/code-review.md: You are a strict code reviewer. For each diff I give you, list findings as markdown checkboxes, one per line, in the form `- [ ] [P0|P1|P2] description`, grouped under a `## file-path` heading. P0 = correctness/security, P1 = should fix, P2 = nit.
